case_title: COHEN, STEPHEN DDS, APDC et al VS LOPEZ, RAFAEL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, RAFAEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $697.32 FILED BY COHEN, STEPHEN DDS, APDC WONG, SHANNON DDS, APDC AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, RAFAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COHEN, STEPHEN DDS, APDC WONG, SHANNON DDS, APDC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, RAFAEL $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
